title: Crispy Knead Vegan Shrimp Bowl
description: A buttery and crispy shrimp bowl with a touch of chewiness from the kneaded texture, perfect for kids and vegan families.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons cornstarch
ingredients.notes: mixed with water to make a slurry

ingredients.name: 2 tablespoons tapioca starch
ingredients.notes: mixed with water to make a slurry

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup soy sauce (use tamari for vegan)
Pinch of salt and black pepper
2 cups coconut milk or almond milk
1 tablespoon chopped fresh cilantro (optional, for garnish)

instructions: Heat a wok or large frying pan with vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and stir-fry until fragrant.
Gently simmer the drained black beans in the garlic mixture for about 2 minutes.
In a bowl, mix cornstarch slurry with water to make a smooth consistency.
Pour the slurry into the wok and continuously stir until the sauce thickens. Taste for seasoning and add soy sauce, salt, and pepper if desired.
While stirring gently, gradually add coconut milk or almond milk while continuing to cook.
Add shrimp pieces one by one, and let them sit in each batch of sauce before adding another piece.
Once all the shrimp are cooked through, taste again for seasoning. Add more salt and pepper as needed if desired.
Garnish with chopped fresh cilantro (optional) before serving.
Serve immediately over a bed of rice or noodles.
